title: peucedanum cervaria
intro: Peucedanum cervaria, also known as Wild Carrot or Carrot Fern, is a plant species belonging to the parsley family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant and digestive aid, to help relieve coughs, colds, and indigestion. The health benefits of Peucedanum cervaria include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
